text:
The Many Egregious Features of Sucksville:

- People who look similar enough to each other to be hired as decoys

- The bakers are incompetent, either burning the bread badly enough to have to call the fire department, or just stealing the damn bread

- The milkmen, possibly to save money, purposefully water down the milk they serve. They also drop bottles often.

- The mail man tampered with the mail by throwing it all out and will likely be arrested for this.

- An experimental bio-engineered plant was capable of absorbing power so quickly it made the power plant blackout. The power lines were damaged, but the repairmen will likely take forever to fix them, likely due to being paid hourly. 

- Richard seems to be Mr. Shor's only regular customer, as most of the town residents find him to be gross for one reason or another. 

- Schrodinger's shoe store is in a fluctuating state of existence and non-existence

- The Sucksville Elementary school has enough budget to have a bus just for special needs students, but their staff are too incompetent to recognize a decoy. 

- The water supply is highly contaminated with urine

- The Mayor "elected" himself, and also allowed public displays of lewd acts such as masturbating on the sidewalks. He's also just not good at maintaining the city due to the aforementioned issues. The Mayor also renamed Town Hall to the "Itty Bitty Shitty Town Hall", or thats just what people call it. The Mayor is also constantly high on Cocaine. 

- Jon Arbuckle resides in the city, or close by, and is hired to keep Garfield from disrupting the community. Garfield was recently in a car crash. 

- The food inspectors, both due to incompetence on their own part as well as being bribed, allow the bakers to continue their business despite their poor practices. Apparently, the bread tastes so bad that Richard would rather eat garbage off of the street. 

- The law enforcement due their job partially, enforcing the law onto citizens but never being forced to uphold the laws for themselves. They also seem to help wild otters navigate the city. 

- The city has a dedicated dump, but trash rarely ever goes there. Employees have even been known to have dumped trash in the street! Children are also known to often play in it. 

- The Recreation Center and Procreation are right next to each other. Nothing is out of the ordinary with the Recreation center, only that its exterior is identical to the Procreation Center. I imagine the Procreation Center is a sperm bank of some kind. 

- The city has a dedicated playground, but it only has see-saws. Many, many see-saws. 

- Recreational marijuana is allowed in the city, but only in the Recreational Center. 

- Likely due to a lack of budget, city workers such as firemen and trash men have been protesting. The firemen committing arson across the city and dump, and the trash workers dumping trash in the streets and in front of the Recreation Center. 

- The telecommunications center is the only part of town operating normally, besides a one-off incident of some man shouting. The Church also seems normal, and you should go there if you're ever stuck in this awful city.
